items.name: stem-illustration-skill
items.description: 面向 STEM（科学、技术、工程、数学）领域的 AI 图像生成 Skill。  生成科研示意图、教学插图、技术架构图等概念性图像，覆盖生物医学、化学、物理、工程、数学 6 大学科。  功能特性 24 个场景模板：信号通路、实验流程、细胞结构、概念信息图、学术海报、机制图、质粒图、机器学习架构等 6 大学科适配：生命科学/医学/化学/物理/工程/数学 4 种风格变体：academic / textbook / infographic / 3d-render

items.name: open-dictate
items.description: Local-first Traditional Chinese dictation for macOS

items.name: midscroll
items.description: FOSS Middle Mouse Scroll replacement for Linux

items.name: block-parser
items.description: A lightweight blockchain block parser written in modern C++ that reads raw block files, extracts header information, verifies hashes, decodes transactions and provides a simple command-line interface for blockchain research.

items.name: btc-node-tools
items.description: Lightweight command-line utilities for inspecting Bitcoin blockchain data, decoding block headers, validating hashes and analyzing peer-to-peer network information for educational and research purposes.

items.name: simple-wallet-cli
items.description: A minimal command-line cryptocurrency wallet simulator demonstrating wallet generation, balance tracking, transaction history and address validation for educational blockchain development.

items.name: p2p-messenger
items.description: Experimental peer-to-peer messaging application demonstrating decentralized communication, encrypted message exchange and lightweight node discovery using the Go programming language.

items.name: sha256-bench
items.description: A lightweight benchmarking utility for comparing SHA-256 hashing performance across different file sizes and memory buffers. Includes timing reports, checksum validation and command-line options for educational use.

items.name: crypto-playground
items.description: Educational Python implementations of classic cryptographic algorithms including SHA-256 hashing, Caesar cipher, XOR encryption, Base58 encoding, Merkle tree construction and key generation examples for learning purposes.

items.name: Danielreedyel
items.description: Open source developer focused on cryptography, distributed systems, Bitcoin research and secure peer-to-peer software.

items.name: oil-visual
items.description: A manga-ink illustration style for clear visual explanations with Codex

items.name: codeforces-solutions
items.description: A collection of my accepted C++ solutions to Codeforces problems, including contest submissions, problemset practice, and Assiut University Newcomers training sheets.

items.name: adopt-me-script-pc-executor
items.description: Compact Windows 10/11 landing build for a Roblox script executor focused on Lua execution, a streamlined script hub, and quick access to automation, hotkeys, and customization controls.

items.name: ae-motion-compiler-script
items.description: Motion graphics scripting framework for Adobe After Effects CC 2024+ that helps build procedural animation pipelines, manage layers in bulk, and automate rendering steps for motion design workflows.

items.name: rebaranalysis-v2026-qc
items.description: AI-assisted rebar inspection platform for civil engineering teams, matching site photos with design drawings to evaluate compliance and support BIM workflows in version 2026.

items.name: 1-v30-data-manager
items.description: Windows data management utility for batch automation, file organization, and desktop task handling, with lightweight logging plus CSV and Excel workflow support in version 3.0.

items.name: aiseesoft-3d-converter-windows
items.description: Aiseesoft 3D Converter v6.5.22 for Windows turns standard videos into stereoscopic 3D and VR-ready output, with batch processing and GPU acceleration.

items.name: aescripts-faux-lock-2026
items.description: A productivity plugin for Adobe After Effects that protects selected layers, helps prevent accidental edits, and keeps complex compositions organized in version 2026.

items.name: auto-mouse-keyboard-v6612-win
items.description: Windows automation utility for mouse and keyboard workflows, with macro capture, script-driven input control, and profile handling in version 6.6.1.2.

items.name: ae-motion-compiler-render
items.description: Adobe After Effects CC 2024+ scripting utility for motion graphics workflows, with procedural animation, layer structuring, and render automation.

items.name: block-randomizer-fabric
items.description: Client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft Java Edition that randomizes hotbar slot selection after block placement, rotating through chosen slots and showing clear in-game status cues.

items.name: zapretdiscord
items.description: Новая версия с поддержкой работы Discord в текущих условиях. Быстрее, стабильнее, надежнее.

items.name: codexQIYU-image-workflow
items.description: 电商生图工作流是一套面向跨境电商的 Codex 图片生产插件，提供快捷生成、主图与详情页、自定分批、一比一复刻、风格裂变、批量改尺寸、批量 SKU 和局部迁移八种工作流，支持 GPT Image 2 提示词优化、生成确认、逐图质检与失败续跑。  A Codex plugin for ecommerce image production, featuring eight workflows with GPT Image 2 prompt optimization, approval gates, per-image quality checks, and resumable generation.

items.name: grok-account-manager-main
items.description: grok注册机，支持域名邮箱和微软邮箱

items.name: Devin-Model-Pro
items.description: Devin支持定义第三方模型，Free 账号和 Pro 账号都能用。 适用于 Mac，Windows 本地运行 | 无后端服务器

items.name: loom
items.description: Native macOS generative MIDI instrument — a complete evolving dark-ambient arrangement from a single seed.
